select_when: The team can name what it is actually maximizing or minimizing instead of treating a vague aspiration as the objective.
Real constraints like time, capital, risk, or operating bottlenecks materially change which option is best.
A recommendation needs to make trade-offs explicit by stating what is being protected, what is being sacrificed, and which metric wins when goals conflict.
The work is drowning in detail and needs a leverage-centered frame that filters nonessential effort while keeping the true target visible.
avoid_when: The measurable proxy is drifting away from the real outcome, so local optimization would improve the dashboard while damaging the actual objective.
The situation is genuinely novel or uncertainty-dominated enough that strict maximization language will hide unknowns and discourage resilience thinking.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on objective clarity, constraint-aware trade-offs, and leverage filtering rather than widening it into general efficiency rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style optimization-process sprawl because the raw source is strongest on objective function clarity, constraints, and proxy-risk discipline.
Did not add higher-order composition fields because this batch remains inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The output type compresses a source that spans strategy, learning, communication, and system design.

select_when.note: The activation conditions are explicit in the raw source passages on named objectives, real constraints, and explicit trade-offs.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly grounded in the source warnings about proxy-target drift and overfitting optimization to uncertainty-heavy cases.

input_type.note: The source is explicit about constrained optimization and objective clarity; the compact input label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The source naturally yields leverage-focused trade-off plans, but the typed output label is a compact reviewed abstraction.

reasoning_types.note: Optimization theory clearly relies on cause-and-effect trade-off logic and system constraints, while the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
